issues.description: Effect array is empty. Card has a [When Attacking] trigger that should prevent opponent's Characters with ≤2000 power from activating [Blocker] during this turn. This requires: trigger OnAttack, condition checking power, action applying blocking restriction.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [When Attacking] All of your opponent's Characters with 2000 power or less cannot activate [Blocker] during this turn.
